_meta.note: Verification ledger for every auto rate atom. Integrity SLA: each atom must be re-verified against a real source at least every 30 days. A snapshot of each value is stored; if index.html later differs, the atom is DRIFTED and must be re-verified. Update dates only via `audit_rates.py --mark`/`--mark-all` after an actual source check.
